candidate_definition_hints.text: Lightweight and performance oriented search box UI component libraries for React, Vue, React Native, JS and Flutter

Searchbox is a lightweight and performance focused search UI component library to query and display results from your ElasticSearch index using declarative props. It's available for React, Vue, React Native and Flutter.

candidate_glosses.text: Searchbox is a lightweight and performance focused search UI component library to query and display results from your ElasticSearch index using declarative props. It's available for React, Vue, React Native and Flutter.
